content:
| Use | How |
| --- | --- |
| **AI Prompt Role** | “Act as my 3-line Martyr: what truth is only learnable through breaking this?” |
| **Creative Workflow** | Schedule “destruction windows” for testing new systems → it’s not a flaw, it’s your forge |
| **Business Structure** | Build multiple experiments—let them fail gracefully. Archive lessons. Rebuild in quiet. |
| **Teaching Method** | Teach from your lived ruins, not theory. Students trust you because you *walked through it.* |

---

## 🔮 COMPATIBILITY & GROWTH

| Domain | Note |
| --- | --- |
| **Relationships** | Need partners who give you space to collapse + regenerate. Micromanagement destroys clarity. |
| **Work** | Best when given freedom to **break, rebuild, vanish, return**. Think recursive contracts. |
| **Creative Systems** | Thrive on **looping structures** with checkpoints for hermit retreat. Build “phases of decay” into your projects. |

---

## 🧭 RECURSIVE PATTERNING
